title: SimpleSpectate
description: SimpleSpectate lets server operators or players with permission teleport into another player’s perspective in spectator mode and then return to their original location.
body:
### **SimpleSpectate**

Watch other players in Spectator Mode easily

### **Features:**

With SimpleSpectate, you can teleport to other players and watch them from spectator mode. You can return to your old position and previous game mode at any time, making it easy to observe without losing your place. The plugin works smoothly on all supported server versions.

### **Permissions:**

You need the permission **simplespectate.use** or be a server operator to use this plugin. Players who have the permission can start spectating other players, and when they finish, they will automatically return to their previous location and game mode. Players without this permission cannot use the plugin.

### **Commands:**

_/spectate <player>_ – Teleports you to another player and puts you into spectator mode so you can watch them.

_/spectate_ – Returns you to your old location and previous game mode, exiting spectator mode.
